overview.description: Test expression variable creation and usage
overview.name: Variable(expression) Test

var.comment: Create expression variable with repeat method
var.name: expressionVar

assert.comment: Check if the expression result equals 'TestlumTestlumTestlum'

var.comment: Create expression variable with reserved symbols
var.name: expressionWithSymbols

assert.comment: Check if the expression with reserved symbols equals '$Test@$Test@'
